title: carptotepala jenmanii
intro: Carptotepala jenmanii, also known as the Jenman's carpet fern, is a rare, low-growing fern species native to the tropical regions of Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and improving respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Carptotepala jenmanii typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be made into teas or infusions for medicinal use.
